release.name: n8n@2.9.2
release.body:
## [2.9.2](https://github.com/n8n-io/n8n/compare/n8n@2.9.1...n8n@2.9.2) (2026-02-23)


### Bug Fixes

* **editor:** Alignment issues and nits ([#25954](https://github.com/n8n-io/n8n/issues/25954)) ([92c8e68](https://github.com/n8n-io/n8n/commit/92c8e68a79f4278fb8a176689e4e541c3d6143af))
* **editor:** Fix bug with tags not being sent to backend ([#26040](https://github.com/n8n-io/n8n/issues/26040)) ([61c529c](https://github.com/n8n-io/n8n/commit/61c529cc45eb280b6d3d9eac55a35aea3325f5e1))
* **editor:** Fix visual issues on new Chat hub tools selector ([#26010](https://github.com/n8n-io/n8n/issues/26010)) ([aae6449](https://github.com/n8n-io/n8n/commit/aae6449e7108c455010064a7cc2e0fc20475e3d7))
* **editor:** Make Chat hub text prompt scrollable ([#26019](https://github.com/n8n-io/n8n/issues/26019)) ([446473e](https://github.com/n8n-io/n8n/commit/446473e81a3f130fa94b3cceeebd82be830df0b6))

items.rawText: **editor:** Fix bug with tags not being sent to backend ([#26040](https://github.com/n8n-io/n8n/issues/26040)) ([61c529c](https://github.com/n8n-io/n8n/commit/61c529cc45eb280b6d3d9eac55a35aea3325f5e1))

**editor:** Fix visual issues on new Chat hub tools selector ([#26010](https://github.com/n8n-io/n8n/issues/26010)) ([aae6449](https://github.com/n8n-io/n8n/commit/aae6449e7108c455010064a7cc2e0fc20475e3d7))
**editor:** Make Chat hub text prompt scrollable ([#26019](https://github.com/n8n-io/n8n/issues/26019)) ([446473e](https://github.com/n8n-io/n8n/commit/446473e81a3f130fa94b3cceeebd82be830df0b6))
